items.name: pr-review-sentinel
items.title: PR Review Sentinel
items.description: Review pull requests against team conventions, flag risky changes, and post structured, actionable feedback.

items.name: browser-qa-runner
items.title: Browser QA Runner
items.description: Walk critical user flows in a real browser, capture evidence, and file reproducible bug reports.

items.name: api-contract-guardian
items.title: API Contract Guardian
items.description: Detect drift between API specs, real behavior, and docs; draft changelogs, migration notes, and fixes.

items.name: competitive-intel-scout
items.title: Competitive Intel Scout
items.description: Track competitors' pricing, changelogs, and traffic; report evidence-cited changes since the last check.

items.name: churn-risk-sentinel
items.title: Churn Risk Sentinel
items.description: Correlate usage drop-off with billing events, remember account history, and propose specific save plays.

items.name: inbound-lead-qualifier
items.title: Inbound Lead Qualifier
items.description: Qualify site visitors conversationally, score fit against your ICP, and hand sales a context-rich lead.

items.name: ai-search-visibility-analyst
items.title: AI Search Visibility Analyst
items.description: Measure how your brand appears in AI answers and search, diagnose citation gaps, and prioritize content fixes.

items.name: spend-subscription-controller
items.title: Spend & Subscription Controller
items.description: Flag card-spend anomalies, upcoming SaaS renewals, and duplicate subscriptions with owner-ready actions.

items.name: whatsapp-chief-of-staff
items.title: Chief of Staff (WhatsApp)
items.description: A pocket chief of staff: captures tasks from quick messages, tracks commitments, and remembers what matters across weeks.

items.name: developer-community-manager
items.title: Developer Community Manager
items.description: Triage community questions, escalate real bugs with reproductions, and turn recurring pain into roadmap signal.

items.name: telegram-assistant-starter
items.title: Telegram Assistant Starter
items.description: Message a Telegram bot and it replies per your instructions. The blank canvas — edit instructions.md and nothing else.

items.name: discord-docs-starter
items.title: Discord Docs Starter
items.description: Answers Discord questions from a single knowledge.md FAQ you paste in. Demos giving an agent knowledge.

items.name: github-issue-labeler-starter
items.title: GitHub Issue Labeler Starter
items.description: New issue opened → applies one label from your taxonomy and asks for repro steps when a bug report is thin.

items.name: linear-triage-starter
items.title: Linear Triage Starter
items.description: Delegated Linear tickets get a priority and team recommendation from rules in your instructions.

items.name: daily-digest-starter
items.title: Daily Digest Starter
items.description: Weekday 9am UTC: fetch one RSS feed and post a five-item summary to Slack. Demos cron schedules.

items.name: uptime-watch-starter
items.title: Uptime Watch Starter
items.description: Checks one URL every 5 minutes and Telegram-alerts you only when it goes down or recovers.

items.name: sms-reminder-starter
items.title: SMS Reminder Starter
items.description: Text "remind me Thursday at 9" via Twilio and get texted back at that time. Demos dynamic scheduling.

items.name: approval-gate-starter
items.title: Approval Gate Starter
items.description: Refunds always need Slack approval; service restarts use once(). Tool bodies log only — swap in real actions.

items.name: openapi-chat-starter
items.title: OpenAPI Chat Starter
items.description: Chat with any HTTP API in plain English. Ships on Swagger Petstore; swap OPENAPI_SPEC_URL for yours.

items.name: webhook-summarizer-starter
items.title: Webhook Summarizer Starter
items.description: POST any text to a custom webhook and get a classified summary in Slack. Demos custom channels.

items.name: cron-task-starter
items.title: Cron Task Starter
items.description: A fire-and-forget weekly task as a plain markdown schedule — cron in frontmatter, prompt in the body.

items.name: receipt-scanner-starter
items.title: Receipt Scanner Starter
items.description: Photo a receipt in Telegram and get merchant, total, category, and line items back. Demos attachments.

items.name: translator-starter
items.title: Translator Starter
items.description: Paste text, get it back in TARGET_LANGUAGE. Instructions-only — the entire product is the prompt.

items.name: headless-api-starter
items.title: Headless API Starter
items.description: Drive an agent with curl or eve/client — no chat UI. Demos the default HTTP session protocol.

items.name: evals-playground-starter
items.title: Evals Playground Starter
items.description: A tiny agent plus numbered evals teaching succeeded, calledTool, parked, check, and judge.
